require('fs');\\\\\\\\nconst path = require('path');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconsole.log('🔨 Iniciando build do dashboard...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Função para minificar JavaScript\\\\\\\\nfunction minifyJS(code) {\\\\\\\\n    // Proteção: evitar que \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"http://\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", etc. sejam tratados como comentário de linha.\\\\\\\\n    // O minificador abaixo remove tudo após \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"//\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" na linha; sem essa proteção, URLs são corrompidas.\\\\\\\\n    const PROTOCOL_PLACEHOLDER = '__COLON_SLASH_SLASH__';\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\//g, PROTOCOL_PLACEHOLDER);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Remove comentários\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\*[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\//g, '');\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/.*/g, '');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Restaura separador de protocolo\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(new RegExp(PROTOCOL_PLACEHOLDER, 'g'), '://');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove espaços em branco extras\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, ' ');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove espaços ao redor de operadores\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*([+\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\-*/%=&lt;&gt;!&amp;|,;:?(){}[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*/g, '$1');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove quebras de linha desnecessárias\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n+/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    return code.trim();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Função para minificar CSS\\\\\\\\nfunction minifyCSS(code) {\\\\\\\\n    // Remove comentários\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\*[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\//g, '');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove espaços em branco extras\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, ' ');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove espaços ao redor de : ; { }\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*([{}:;,])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*/g, '$1');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove quebras de linha\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n+/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    return code.trim();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Função para minificar HTML\\\\\\\\nfunction minifyHTML(code) {\\\\\\\\n    // Remove comentários HTML\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/&lt;!--[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?--&gt;/g, '');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove espaços em branco entre tags\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+&lt;/g, '&gt;&lt;');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Remove múltiplos espaços\\\\\\\\n    code = code.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s+/g, ' ');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    return code.trim();\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Criar diretório dist se não existir\\\\\\\\nconst distDir = path.join(__dirname, 'dist');\\\\\\\\nif (!fs.existsSync(distDir)) {\\\\\\\\n    fs.mkdirSync(distDir);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntry {\\\\\\\\n    // Minificar app.js\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚙️  Minificando app.js...');\\\\\\\\n    const appJS = fs.readFileSync('app.js', 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    const minifiedJS = minifyJS(appJS);\\\\\\\\n    fs.writeFileSync('dist/app.js', minifiedJS);\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;✅ app.js: ${appJS.length} bytes → ${minifiedJS.length} bytes (${Math.round((1 - minifiedJS.length/appJS.length) * 100)}% redução)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Minificar styles.css\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚙️  Minificando styles.css...');\\\\\\\\n    const stylesCSS = fs.readFileSync('styles.css', 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    const minifiedCSS = minifyCSS(stylesCSS);\\\\\\\\n    fs.writeFileSync('dist/styles.css', minifiedCSS);\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;✅ styles.css: ${stylesCSS.length} bytes → ${minifiedCSS.length} bytes (${Math.round((1 - minifiedCSS.length/stylesCSS.length) * 100)}% redução)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Minificar index.html\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚙️  Minificando index.html...');\\\\\\\\n    const indexHTML = fs.readFileSync('index.html', 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n    const minifiedHTML = minifyHTML(indexHTML);\\\\\\\\n    fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html', minifiedHTML);\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;✅ index.html: ${indexHTML.length} bytes → ${minifiedHTML.length} bytes (${Math.round((1 - minifiedHTML.length/indexHTML.length) * 100)}% redução)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Copiar outros arquivos\\\\\\\\n    console.log('📦 Copiando arquivos estáticos...');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Copiar netlify.toml\\\\\\\\n    fs.copyFileSync('netlify.toml', 'dist/netlify.toml');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Copiar _redirects\\\\\\\\n    fs.copyFileSync('_redirects', 'dist/_redirects');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    // Copiar pasta icons\\\\\\\\n    const iconsDir = path.join(distDir, 'icons');\\\\\\\\n    if (!fs.existsSync(iconsDir)) {\\\\\\\\n        fs.mkdirSync(iconsDir);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    const iconsFiles = fs.readdirSync('icons');\\\\\\\\n    iconsFiles.forEach(file =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        fs.copyFileSync(path.join('icons', file), path.join(iconsDir, file));\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Arquivos estáticos copiados\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    console.log('🎉 Build concluído com sucesso!');\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;📁 Arquivos de produção em: ${distDir}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n} catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('❌ Erro durante o build:', error);\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":121}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"2a23c515-6b2f-4b85-be88-dc069427b172\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"c5fd4876-09d5-4b9c-8b07-acc5a91c9be0\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-07T04:06:37.963Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson &#96;index.html&#96; - Main HTML file\\\\n- &#96;test.html&#96; - Test HTML file\\\\n- &#96;app.js&#96; - Main JavaScript application\\\\n- &#96;styles.css&#96; - Stylesheet\\\\n- &#96;package.json&#96; - Node.js dependencies and scripts\\\\n- &#96;netlify.toml&#96; - Netlify configuration with caching headers\\\\n- &#96;_redirects&#96; - Netlify redirects configuration\\\\n- &#96;build.js&#96; - Build script (basic minification)\\\\n- &#96;build-pro.js&#96; - Professional build script (uses terser, clean-css)\\\\n- &#96;.gitignore&#96; - Git ignore rules\\\\n\\\\n### Icons Directory:\\\\n- &#96;icons/favicon.ico&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/icon-72x72.png&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/icon-96x96.png&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/icon-144x144.png&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/icon-192x192.png&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/icon-512x512.png&#96;\\\\n- &#96;icons/logoViCa.png&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Caching &amp; HTTP Headers Configuration\\\\n\\\\n### 1. &#96;netlify.toml&#96; - HTTP Headers &amp; Caching Configuration\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;toml\\\\n[[headers]]\\\\n  # Headers de segurança para todas as páginas\\\\n  for = \\\\\\\"/*\\\\\\\"\\\\n  [headers.values]\\\\n    X-Frame-Options = \\\\\\\"DENY\\\\\\\"\\\\n    X-Content-Type-Options = \\\\\\\"nosniff\\\\\\\"\\\\n    X-XSS-Protection = \\\\\\\"1; mode=block\\\\\\\"\\\\n    Referrer-Policy = \\\\\\\"strict-origin-when-cross-origin\\\\\\\"\\\\n    Permissions-Policy = \\\\\\\"geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()\\\\\\\"\\\\n    \\\\n[[headers]]\\\\n  # Cache para arquivos estáticos\\\\n  for = \\\\\\\"/*.css\\\\\\\"\\\\n  [headers.values]\\\\n    Cache-Control = \\\\\\\"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\\\\\\\"\\\\n    \\\\n[[headers]]\\\\n  for = \\\\\\\"/*.js\\\\\\\"\\\\n  [headers.values]\\\\n    Cache-Control = \\\\\\\"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\\\\\\\"\\\\n    \\\\n[[headers]]\\\\n  # Não fazer cache do HTML para sempre ter versão mais recente\\\\n  for = \\\\\\\"/*.html\\\\\\\"\\\\n  [headers.values]\\\\n    Cache-Control = \\\\\\\"public, max-age=0, must-revalidate\\\\\\\"\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Caching Strategy:**\\\\n- CSS files: 1 year cache (&#96;max-age=31536000&#96;) with &#96;immutable&#96;\\\\n- JS files: 1 year cache (&#96;max-age=31536000&#96;) with &#96;immutable&#96;\\\\n- HTML files: No cache (&#96;max-age=0, must-revalidate&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n### 2. &#96;_redirects&#96; - Netlify Redirects\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n/*    /index.html   200\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\nSPA fallback configuration.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Service Workers &amp; PWA\\\\n\\\\n### Service Workers: None found\\\\n- No &#96;sw.js&#96;\\\\n- No &#96;service-worker.js&#96;\\\\n- No service worker registration in &#96;app.js&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### PWA Manifest: None found\\\\n- No &#96;manifest.json&#96;\\\\n- No &#96;manifest.webmanifest&#96;\\\\n- No manifest link in HTML files\\\\n\\\\n### PWA Meta Tags: Not found\\\\n- No &#96;theme-color&#96; meta tag\\\\n- No &#96;apple-mobile-web-app-capable&#96; meta tag\\\\n- No PWA-related meta tags in &#96;index.html&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## HTML Files Analysis\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;index.html&#96;\\\\n- Contains favicon and icon links (lines 9-15)\\\\n- No PWA manifest link\\\\n- No service worker registration script\\\\n- No cache-related meta tags\\\\n- Uses external CDN resources (Supabase, Google Fonts, Font Awesome)\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;test.html&#96;\\\\n- Simple test file\\\\n- No caching or PWA configuration\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## JavaScript Files Analysis\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;app.js&#96;\\\\n- No service worker registration code\\\\n- No caching logic\\\\n- Uses Supabase for real-time data\\\\n- No offline functionality\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Build Configuration\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;build.js&#96;\\\\n- Basic minification script\\\\n- Creates &#96;dist/&#96; directory\\\\n- Minifies JS, CSS, and HTML\\\\n- Copies static files including &#96;netlify.toml&#96; and &#96;_redirects&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;build-pro.js&#96;\\\\n- Professional build using:\\\\n  - &#96;terser&#96; for JavaScript minification\\\\n  - &#96;clean-css-cli&#96; for CSS minification\\\\n  - &#96;html-minifier-terser&#96; for HTML minification\\\\n- Copies configuration files to &#96;dist/&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\n### Files Related to Caching:\\\\n1. &#96;netlify.toml&#96; - Contains all caching headers configuration\\\\n2. &#96;_redirects&#96; - SPA routing configuration\\\\n3. &#96;build.js&#96; / &#96;build-pro.js&#96; - Build scripts (no caching logic, just minification)\\\\n\\\\n### Missing PWA/Service Worker Components:\\\\n- No service worker files\\\\n- No manifest.json/webmanifest\\\\n- No service worker registration\\\\n- No PWA meta tags\\\\n- No offline functionality\\\\n\\\\n### Current Caching Setup:\\\\n- Static assets (CSS/JS): Long-term caching (1 year)\\\\n- HTML files: No cache (always fresh)\\\\n- Security headers configured\\\\n- SPA routing configured\\\\n\\\\nThe project has basic HTTP caching configured via Netlify headers, but no PWA features or service workers <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a clear picture of the problem. Let me analyze the caching issue:

1. **The root cause**: In `netlify.toml`, the CSS and JS files are configured with `Cache-Control: "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"`. This means:
   - `max-age=31536000` = 1 year cache
   - `immutable` = the browser will NEVER revalidate these files, even on refresh

2. **The problem**: The file names never change (`app.js`, `styles.css`). When the user deploys an update:
   - The HTML file is correctly set to `max-age=0, must-revalidate`, so the browser always fetches the latest HTML
   - But the HTML still references the same static filenames, and since the browser cached them for a year with the immutable flag, it won't check for updates, leaving users stuck with stale assets until the cache naturally expires or they manually clear it

3. **The solution**: I need to implement either query string versioning by appending a version identifier to the file references, or use content-based hashing to generate unique filenames whenever the files change, ensuring the browser fetches new assets when deployments happen.

4. **Additional issues**: The HTML lacks cache control meta tags, the build scripts don't implement any cache-busting mechanism, the publish directory points to root instead of using the dist folder, and there's no service worker to manage cache updates.

For this simple static site, the most practical approach is to adjust the cache headers for JavaScript and CSS to use `no-cache` with `must-revalidate` instead of `immutable`, which forces the browser to validate with the server before using cached versions while still allowing caching for performance—though this means files get re-downloaded more frequently than with immutable caching.

A better solution would be adding version query strings to the asset references in the HTML and updating the build script to generate hashes based on file content, keeping the long cache headers intact since the URLs themselves change with each deploy. This balances simplicity with good performance and ensures users always get updates without requiring a complex build system overhaul.

I should also note that the `publish = "."` configuration means Netlify is serving directly from the root directory rather than from a `dist/` folder, so the build scripts aren't actually being used during production deployment.</details></think>

{
  "plan": "# Corrigir Retenção de Cache no Dashboard Vi.Ca\n\n## Diagnostico - Causa Raiz\n\nO problema está no [&#96;netlify.toml&#96;](netlify.toml), linhas 29-38:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;toml\n[[headers]]\n  for = \"/*.css\"\n  [headers.values]\n    Cache-Control = \"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\"\n\n[[headers]]\n  for = \"/*.js\"\n  [headers.values]\n    Cache-Control = \"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**O que acontece:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant User as Usuario\n    participant Browser as Navegador\n    participant Netlify as Netlify CDN\n\n    Note over User,Netlify: Primeira visita\n    User-&gt;&gt;Browser: Abre o site\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET index.html\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: HTML (max-age=0)\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET app.js\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: app.js (max-age=1ano, immutable)\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET styles.css\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: styles.css (max-age=1ano, immutable)\n    Note over Browser: Salva JS e CSS no cache por 1 ANO\n\n    Note over User,Netlify: Apos deploy de atualizacao\n    User-&gt;&gt;Browser: Abre o site novamente\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET index.html (novo!)\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: HTML atualizado\n    Note over Browser: HTML pede \"app.js\" e \"styles.css\"\n    Note over Browser: Mesmo nome! Cache immutable!\n    Note over Browser: USA VERSAO ANTIGA DO CACHE\n    Note over Browser: NAO consulta o servidor!\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Tres fatores combinados causam o bug:**\n\n1. **&#96;max-age=31536000&#96;** - O navegador guarda os arquivos por **1 ano inteiro**\n2. **&#96;immutable&#96;** - O navegador **nunca** verifica se o arquivo mudou, nem com F5/refresh\n3. **Nomes fixos** - Os arquivos sempre se chamam &#96;app.js&#96; e &#96;styles.css&#96;, entao o navegador acha que sao os mesmos\n\nIsso afeta tanto **mobile** quanto **desktop** porque e um comportamento padrao de todos os navegadores modernos.\n\n## Solucao Proposta: Cache Busting via Query String + Build Script\n\nA estrategia e manter o cache longo (bom para performance) mas forcar o navegador a baixar o arquivo novo quando ele muda, alterando a URL com um hash do conteudo.\n\n### Passo 1: Atualizar o Build Script\n\nModificar [&#96;build.js&#96;](build.js) para:\n- Calcular um hash MD5 do conteudo de &#96;app.js&#96; e &#96;styles.css&#96;\n- Injetar o hash como query string no &#96;index.html&#96;: &#96;app.js?v=abc123&#96; e &#96;styles.css?v=def456&#96;\n- Quando o conteudo muda, o hash muda, a URL muda, e o navegador busca o arquivo novo\n\n### Passo 2: Atualizar o Build-Pro Script\n\nAplicar a mesma logica de hash no [&#96;build-pro.js&#96;](build-pro.js).\n\n### Passo 3: Ajustar os Headers no Netlify\n\nModificar [&#96;netlify.toml&#96;](netlify.toml) para:\n- **Manter** cache longo para CSS/JS (com hash, funciona corretamente)\n- **Remover** o &#96;immutable&#96; como seguranca extra (query string ja resolve, mas &#96;immutable&#96; pode causar problemas em edge cases)\n- Mudar para: &#96;Cache-Control = \"public, max-age=31536000\"&#96; (sem &#96;immutable&#96;)\n\n### Passo 4: Adicionar Meta Tags de Cache no HTML\n\nAdicionar no [&#96;index.html&#96;](index.html) dentro do &#96;&lt;head&gt;&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;html\n&lt;meta http-equiv=\"Cache-Control\" content=\"no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate\"&gt;\n&lt;meta http-equiv=\"Pragma\" content=\"no-cache\"&gt;\n&lt;meta http-equiv=\"Expires\" content=\"0\"&gt;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIsso reforça que o HTML em si nunca deve ser cacheado.\n\n### Passo 5: Ativar o Build no Deploy\n\nAtualmente, o &#96;netlify.toml&#96; tem o build comentado e publica do diretorio raiz (&#96;publish = \".\"&#96;). Devemos:\n- Descomentar o &#96;command = \"npm run build\"&#96; \n- Mudar &#96;publish&#96; para &#96;\"dist\"&#96;\n- Garantir que o &#96;package.json&#96; tem o script &#96;build&#96; configurado\n\n## Fluxo Apos a Correcao\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nsequenceDiagram\n    participant User as Usuario\n    participant Browser as Navegador\n    participant Netlify as Netlify CDN\n\n    Note over User,Netlify: Primeira visita\n    User-&gt;&gt;Browser: Abre o site\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET index.html\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: HTML (no-cache)\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET app.js?v=abc123\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: app.js (cache 1 ano)\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET styles.css?v=def456\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: styles.css (cache 1 ano)\n\n    Note over User,Netlify: Apos deploy com mudancas\n    User-&gt;&gt;Browser: Abre o site\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET index.html (sempre busca novo)\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: HTML com ?v=xyz789 (hash novo!)\n    Browser-&gt;&gt;Netlify: GET app.js?v=xyz789 (URL diferente!)\n    Netlify--&gt;&gt;Browser: app.js NOVO (cache 1 ano)\n    Note over Browser: Arquivo atualizado automaticamente!\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Arquivos que serao modificados\n\n- [&#96;netlify.toml&#96;](netlify.toml) - Ajustar headers e ativar build\n- [&#96;index.html&#96;](index.html) - Adicionar meta tags anti-cache\n- [&#96;build.js&#96;](build.js) - Adicionar logica de cache busting com hash\n- [&#96;build-pro.js&#96;](build-pro.js) - Mesmo ajuste de cache busting\n- [&#96;package.json&#96;](package.json) - Verificar/ajustar script de build\n",

<tool-use data-tool-type="task" data-tool-name="todo_write">
<details><summary>Tool use: **todo_write** • Todo List</summary>

- [x] Atualizar netlify.toml: remover 'immutable' dos headers CSS/JS, ativar build command, mudar publish para 'dist'
- [x] Adicionar meta tags anti-cache no <head> do index.html
- [x] Modificar build.js para calcular hash MD5 do conteudo e injetar query string ?v=HASH nas referencias de app.js e styles.css no HTML
- [x] Aplicar a mesma logica de cache busting no build-pro.js
- [x] Garantir que package.json tem o script 'build' configurado corretamente

</details>
</tool-use>

---

Todas as tarefas foram concluídas. Aqui está o resumo do que foi feito:

**Arquivos modificados:**

1. **`netlify.toml`** -- Ativado o build (`command = "npm run build"`, `publish = "dist"`) e removido `immutable` dos headers de CSS/JS para eliminar o cache agressivo.

2. **`index.html`** -- Adicionadas meta tags anti-cache (`Cache-Control`, `Pragma`, `Expires`) no `<head>` para reforçar que o HTML nunca seja cacheado pelo navegador.

3. **`build.js`** -- Adicionada a lógica de cache busting: calcula um hash MD5 de 8 caracteres do conteúdo minificado de `app.js` e `styles.css`, e injeta como query string (`?v=34342f05`) nas referências do HTML. Quando o conteúdo muda, o hash muda, e o navegador baixa o arquivo novo.

4. **`build-pro.js`** -- Mesma lógica de cache busting aplicada, adaptada ao fluxo que usa Terser, clean-css e html-minifier-terser.

**O `package.json`** já estava corretamente configurado com `"build": "node build.js"`.

**Resultado:** O build foi testado com sucesso e gerou os arquivos em `dist/` com os hashes injetados (`styles.css?v=629e7e93`, `app.js?v=34342f05`). A partir do próximo deploy no Netlify, cada atualização de CSS ou JS vai gerar um hash diferente, forçando o navegador a baixar a versão mais recente automaticamente.
